name: greet
description: Minimal 1-node template for the LIVE control-VM smoke: launched via POST /api/runs/start, one pi (or claude-code) node writes a single artifact (out/greet/greeting.txt) under --sandbox local (bwrap jail), and the host asserts the run reaches done over SSE and the artifact appears in the run-view. Proves the full serve → start-run → in-VM local-jailed agent → observe path on ONE public HTTPS origin.
